about.title: Who is
about.p1: Eliana Bandeira is an Olympic shot put athlete who transformed a simple childhood in the interior of Ceará into a journey of sporting excellence and human impact.
about.p2: Born in Jaguaribara, Ceará, on July 1, 1996, she grew up in a simple home, surrounded by humble routines, but with dreams too big for the size of the city.
about.p3: At 18, she made the brave decision to cross the Atlantic to Portugal, where she specialized in Shot Put, obtained Portuguese nationality and fulfilled the Olympic dream.
